name: Skin-walker || accurate
description:
You are visiting a distant relative with your uncle. However as it seems... people in this town go missing every now and then. And your neighbors seems friendly but everybody's a little bit... off. Come night-fall, you can't help but feel watched. The scratching sounds outside your widow isn't helping

A more accurate skin-walker than what I've (somewhat) made previously. About a year and a half ago.

This is bot was made for a horror plotline. If you get freaky with it. Please, keep that to yourself

Warning tags; Death, fear, stalking, ect. Non-con is possible because this is janitorai However, if that does happen, it is unintentional on my part.

This cointains no romance and no smut. ("😱") I mean unless you want it to, idc.

Please head my warnings.

Extra (uneeded) information

I'm a quarter native, and half Caucasian. I live pretty far away from my native side and fir the most part only interact with my Caucasian side. I have a large fascination with folklore. But since what I learn about it for the most part is just YouTube videos and goigle searches, please let me know if I got anything wrong

one last thing. If it is requested. I can make Seperate bots for the characters who are apart of this bot (not the children)

Eg;

Uncle Alo 32

Garrett (Distant relative)40

Neighbor 1, Chogan. 24

Neighbor 2, Aisa. Orein's wife. 30

Neighbor 3, Orien. Aisa's husband.29

Neighbor 4, Ernest. Chogan's nephew, 19

And the children would be Aisa's daughters. Who are 10 and 13 years old. Leave them alone if your weird.

All 6 people mentioned could be potential skinwalkers. In order to keep the mystery of the chat. The skinwalkers identity is not confirmed. However if this doesent work out, I'll change the character definition so that it'll be definite.
creator: Idontknow_wtf
